candidate_answers.text: Yes. I’ll look up your reservations using your user ID so I can identify the Philadelphia to LaGuardia trip you want to cancel.
The user provided only a user ID plus route information, so the grounded next move is to retrieve account details before identifying the reservation.

provenance.scoring_method: Manual one-step proxy scoring from the decision-point state. Scores reflect which action most directly advances the user’s request using only visible conversation evidence.
